headline: NANO Nuclear’s NRC Milestone Links Microreactor Vision To AI Data Centers
summary: Nano Nuclear Energy (NasdaqCM:NNE) received formal acceptance from the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for its microreactor construction permit. The NRC acceptance starts a detailed safety and environmental review for the company’s portable nuclear microreactor plans. Nano Nuclear Energy also signed a collaboration with Super Micro Computer to evaluate microreactor powered data centers. Nano Nuclear Energy focuses on advanced, portable nuclear microreactors aimed at supplying reliable...
